source_file.detected_format: Filtered Apartment A DXF text extract with metadata header

file_profile.extract_variant: Apartment A filtered DXF text extract

notes: This file is a filtered extract generated from the raw Apartment A DXF text source.
Lines starting with # are extraction metadata and section markers, not DXF group-code/value pairs.
Raw DXF records are preserved under BLOCK_DEFINITIONS and FILTERED_RECORDS sections.

extraction_metadata.row_granularity: One row per metadata key emitted by the extraction script

block_definition_records.row_granularity: One row per DXF record inside a referenced block definition

filtered_records.row_granularity: One row per kept DXF record related to Apartment A

record_points.row_granularity: One row per parsed point from a kept record

text_values.row_granularity: One row per extracted text value from group codes 1 or 3
